zh.lifeSummary: 當Daniel Collins Sr於1648年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德恩費爾德時，他的父親Deacon Edward Collins45歲，母親Martha Baylie39歲。他於1677年6月3日與Sarah Tibbals在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德恩費爾德結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1690年5月3日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德恩費爾德享年42歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Daniel Collins Sr于1648年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德恩費爾德时，他的父亲Deacon Edward Collins45岁，母亲Martha Baylie39岁。他于1677年6月3日与Sarah Tibbals在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德恩費爾德结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1690年5月3日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德恩費爾德享年42岁。

nameMeanings.name: Collins
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Colin , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

Irish and Manx: shortened Anglicized from Ó Coileáin, compare Cullen , or in Man or west Ulster shortened from Mac Coileáin, compare McQuillan and McCallion . The genitival -s is a local addition to Collin and variants after the surname was Anglicized.
Americanized form of French   Colin   or   Collin   and also   Collette  .

variants.name: Colin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Alfredo, Francisco, Jesus, Ricardo, Alberto, Angel, Arturo, Eduardo, Esteban, Faustino.  French Alexandre, Andre, Armand, Georges, Henri, Jean Claude, Jean-Michel, Laurette, Lucien, Marcel, Patrice, Pierre.
French, Walloon, and Breton: from a French shortened pet form of the personal name   Nicolas   (see   Nicholas  ). This surname is also found in the Flemish part of Belgium.
English: from the personal name Colin, a diminutive of Col, itself a pet form of Nicholas .

variants.name: Kolenc
meanings: nickname from the dialect plant name kolenc ‘yellow bedstraw (Galium verum)’ or ‘common nipplewort (Lapsana communis)’. Compare Collins 3.

variants.name: Collings
meanings: English: variant of Collins or Colling , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: Daniel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name (meaning ‘God is my judge’ in Hebrew), borne by the prophet whose story is told in the Book of Daniel. He was an Israelite slave of the Assyrian king Nebuchadnezzar, who obtained great favour through his skill in interpreting dreams and the ‘writing on the wall’ at the feast held by Nebuchadnezzar's son Belshazzar. His enemies managed to get him cast into a lions' den, but he was saved by God. This was a favourite tale in the Middle Ages, often represented in miracle plays. The name has been perennially popular among English speakers since the 16th century and has been particularly favoured since the 1980s.

en.lifeSummary: When Daniel Collins Sr was born in 1648, in Enfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, his father, Deacon Edward Collins, was 45 and his mother, Martha Baylie, was 39. He married Sarah Tibbals on 3 June 1677, in Enfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 3 May 1690, in Enfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 42.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Daniel Collins Sr è nato il nel 1648 nel Enfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, il suo padre, Deacon Edward Collins, aveva 45 anni e il suo madre, Martha Baylie, aveva 39 anni. Lui sposato Sarah Tibbals il 3 giugno 1677, nel Enfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 3 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Daniel Collins Srが1648年にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ハートフォードエンフィールドで生まれた時，父Deacon Edward Collinsは45歳，母Martha Baylieは39歳であった。1677年6月3日にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ハートフォードエンフィールドでSarah Tibbalsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1690年5月3日にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ハートフォードエンフィールドで42歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Daniel Collins Sr(이)가 1648년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 필드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Deacon Edward Collins(은)는 45세였고, 그의 어머니 Martha Baylie(은)는 39세였다. 그는 1677년 6월 3일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 필드에서 Sarah Tibbals(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1690년 5월 3일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 필드에서 42세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Daniel Collins Sr nasceu em 1648, em Enfield, Hartford, Conecticute, British Colonial America, seu pai, Deacon Edward Collins, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Martha Baylie, tinha 39 anos. Ele casou-se com Sarah Tibbals em 3 de junho de 1677, em Enfield, Hartford, Conecticute, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 3 de maio de 1690, em Enfield, Hartford, Conecticute, British Colonial America, com 42 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Daniel Collins Sr родился в 1648 г. в местности энфиелд, хартфорд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика, его отцу по имени Deacon Edward Collins было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Martha Baylie, 39. Он женился на женщине по имени Sarah Tibbals 3 июня 1677 г. в местности энфиелд, хартфорд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер 3 мая 1690 г. в местности энфиелд, хартфорд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 42 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Daniel Collins Sr nació en 1648, en Enfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, su papá, Deacon Edward Collins, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Martha Baylie, tenía 39 años. Se casó con Sarah Tibbals el 3 de junio de 1677, en Enfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 3 de mayo de 1690, en Enfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 42 años.
